mapper.select: SELECT setting_key, setting_value, secret_flag, updated_by, created_time, updated_time FROM integration_settings WHERE setting_key = #{settingKey} LIMIT 1
SELECT setting_key, setting_value, secret_flag, updated_by, created_time, updated_time FROM integration_settings ORDER BY setting_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO integration_settings ( setting_key, setting_value, secret_flag, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{setting.settingKey}, #{setting.settingValue}, #{setting.secretFlag}, #{setting.updatedBy} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE setting_value = VALUES(setting_value), secret_flag = VALUES(secret_flag), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by)
